records.techniqueSummary: PFAS egg-specific analytical review context linking EFSA review material, EU monitoring recommendations, and Dutch home-egg advisory handling.

records.measurementUncertaintySummary: Measurement uncertainty should be retained where reported to preserve reviewer context for PFAS egg interpretation.
records.storageStabilitySummary: Storage-stability and matrix-specific extraction performance remain external to this pack and should be linked separately when available.
records.samplingPlanSummary: Sampling-plan context follows the governed EU PFAS monitoring recommendation and Dutch home-egg advisory interpretation metadata.
notes: Preserves analytical-method context for PFAS egg review and monitoring import checks.
Dietary MCP records governed PFAS egg review context only.
